name: logveil
description: Local-first sanitizer for agent logs and terminal captures.

scripts.smoke: npm run build && node dist/cli.js --help | grep -q 'LogVeil' && node dist/cli.js --version | grep -q '0.1.0' && node dist/cli.js redact examples/agent-session.log --out /tmp/logveil-smoke.md --json-out /tmp/logveil-smoke.json && node dist/cli.js audit examples/agent-session.log --format json --fail-on none >/tmp/logveil-audit.json
scripts.release:check: npm test && npm run check && npm run build && npm run smoke && npm run package:smoke

author: Roger Chappel
